title: Cattleya × laurae
taxonomy: Cattleya × laurae is a hybrid orchid that belongs to the genus Cattleya. It is a cross between two species of orchids, but the exact parentage is not widely known. This hybrid orchid is often classified as a member of the Cattleya genus within the family Orchidaceae. The Cattleya × laurae is a popular choice among orchid enthusiasts due to its unique appearance and fragrance. Its classification as a hybrid orchid within the Cattleya genus makes it a valuable addition to any orchid collection.
